products.name: Modern Sectional Sofa
products.description: Transform your living room with this luxurious L-shaped sectional sofa. Upholstered in premium fabric with high-density foam cushions for lasting comfort. Features a chaise lounge and USB charging ports built into the armrest.

products.name: Professional Microphone Stand
products.description: Heavy-duty boom arm microphone stand built for studio and live performance. Adjustable height from 35" to 65", aircraft-grade aluminum construction, anti-vibration base, and universal mic clip included.

products.name: Ergonomic Mesh Office Chair
products.description: Engineered for all-day comfort, this award-winning ergonomic chair features a breathable mesh backrest, 6-way adjustable lumbar support, 4D armrests, and a synchronized tilt mechanism. Certified for 8+ hours of use.

products.name: Solid Oak Coffee Table
products.description: Handcrafted from sustainably sourced solid oak with a natural walnut finish. Features a lower storage shelf and hairpin legs for a mid-century modern aesthetic. Each piece is uniquely grained — no two tables are the same.

products.name: Wireless Mechanical Keyboard
products.description: A compact 75% wireless mechanical keyboard with hot-swappable switches, RGB per-key backlighting, and a 4000mAh battery offering up to 200 hours of use. Compatible with Windows, macOS, iOS, and Android via Bluetooth 5.0.

products.name: RGB Gaming Mouse
products.description: Precision-engineered with a 25,600 DPI optical sensor and 7 programmable buttons. Ambidextrous design, 11-zone RGB lighting, onboard memory for 5 profiles, and a braided cable. Rated for 80 million click durability.

products.name: 4K Ultra HD Monitor 27"
products.description: Stunning 27-inch IPS panel with 3840×2160 resolution, 144Hz refresh rate, 1ms response time, and factory-calibrated Delta-E < 2 color accuracy. Includes USB-C, HDMI 2.1, and DisplayPort 1.4 inputs. VESA compatible.

products.name: Premium Noise-Cancelling Headphones
products.description: Industry-leading active noise cancellation with up to 30dB reduction. 40mm dynamic drivers deliver rich, Hi-Res Audio-certified sound. 30-hour battery life, foldable design, and a luxury carrying case included.

products.name: Minimalist Desk Lamp
products.description: Architect-style LED desk lamp with 5 color temperatures (2700K–6500K) and 10 brightness levels. USB-A charging port on the base, touch-sensitive dimmer, memory function, and a flexible gooseneck arm. Energy Star certified.

products.name: Leather Messenger Bag
products.description: Full-grain genuine leather messenger bag with a padded 15.6" laptop compartment, RFID-blocking card slots, and an antique brass buckle closure. Weatherproof lining, adjustable shoulder strap, and a lifetime craftsmanship warranty.
